Liang Boning śĘĀšľĮŚĮß
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liang Boning (śĘĀšľĮŚĮß)was born in Yingchuan. A Yellow Scarves leader in Yingchuan. Defeated and killed by Fu Xie in AD 184. Liang Boning was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Liang Boning lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
